title: athyrium dentigerum
intro: Athyrium dentigerum, also known as the toothed lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium dentigerum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an expectorant to ease congestion. Athyrium dentigerum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its dried leaves can be used in herbal teas, tinctures, and other medicinal preparations.
